sections.title: `AdminLeaveController.php:209` ‚Äî N+1 in `balances()` [**HIGH**]
`AdminLeaveController.php:68‚Äì76` ‚Äî Double query for same row [**MEDIUM**]
Eager loading ‚Äî confirmed good
sections.content:
`AdminAttendanceController.php:28` and `AdminLeaveController.php:28` both use `->with([...])`. No N+1 in list endpoints.

---

sections.title: `useAdminAttendance.ts:16‚Äì28` and `useAdminLeave.ts:16‚Äì21` [**HIGH**]
Over-broad cache invalidation [**MEDIUM**]
`LeaveType` list not cached on backend [**LOW**]
4. Memory Leaks
sections.content:
The `setInterval` in `AttendancePage.tsx:217‚Äì221` properly returns a cleanup ‚Äî no leak there.

React Query handles query cleanup automatically. **No memory leaks were identified** in the reviewed hooks or pages. The codebase appears safe in this area.

---

sections.title: Client-side filtering over server-paginated data [**HIGH**]
Priority Summary
sections.content:
| Priority | Issue | File | Impact |
|----------|-------|------|--------|
| **High** | N+1 in `balances()` foreach | `AdminLeaveController.php:209` | Extra DB query per leave type |
| **High** | No `staleTime` on attendance/leave queries | `useAdminAttendance.ts`, `useAdminLeave.ts` | Refetch on every mount |
| **High** | Client-side filter over paginated data | `AdminAttendanceManagementPage.tsx:153` | Defeats pagination |
| **Medium** | Double `LeaveBalance` query in `approve()` | `AdminLeaveController.php:68‚Äì76` | 2x DB round trips |
| **Medium** | Over-broad cache invalidation | Both hook files | Unnecessary refetches |
| **Low** | No HTTP cache on `LeaveType` list | `AdminLeaveController.php:146` | Repeated static data fetch |

The most impactful fix is the **`balances()` N+1** (backend) and adding **`staleTime`** to the attendance/leave hooks (frontend) ‚Äî both are small changes with meaningful gains.
